Location.title: Location
Location.subtitle: Address
Location.magazinos: ELS MAGAZINOS is the vibrant gastronomic and cultural market of Dènia. With more than 3,000 square meters and over 20 stalls, we are not only large but also close-knit. We believe in fostering connections by highlighting the producers, artists, and chefs who bring our market to life.

About.about: It was the year 1983 when Argentina regained democracy, and on December 10, our gastronomic journey began. Over time, we have grown to have five restaurants in La Plata, Gonnet, City Bell, and Los Hornos. We were pioneers in home delivery services in the capital Buenos Aires, selling more than 10,000 pizzas and 7,000 dozen empanadas. With a dedicated team of 65 employees, we expanded our reach to Paterna, Valencia, successfully presenting Allora Heron City. And, of course, we couldn't miss being present in Denia, designated by UNESCO as a Creative City of Gastronomy. Our offerings encompass three distinct concepts within the Els Magazinos market: Allora, specializing in empanadas and sandwiches; Patagonia, offering gourmet Argentine grills; and Fayiz, dedicated to authentic Arab cuisine.
About.Patagonia: In our establishment, we are true masters of meats, like good Argentines. Here you will enjoy extremely tender meats. First, our meats receive a strong burst of heat to achieve a crispy crust, then we reduce the temperature to 100º for a prolonged cooking that ensures an unmatched texture. All our meats come directly from Ondara and are prepared with Argentine cuts, made specifically for us. Among our standout cuts are entraña, sweetbreads, cheek, and pork shoulder. Each dish is accompanied by exquisite homemade sauces made with Diania oils, such as chimichurri, mustard, and a delicious orange reduction. Come and enjoy a unique culinary experience that highlights the best of Argentine tradition in every bite.
About.Allora: Enjoy the authentic flavors of Argentina, crafted fresh every day with artisanal care. Our star empanadas feature tempting fillings like onion and provolone, pork and plum, beef and roasted vegetables, or mozzarella and mixed vegetables, a tempting variety to satisfy all palates. But that's just the beginning. Dive deeper into our menu and discover a fusion of Argentine and Mediterranean influences, where traditional recipes meet innovative twists. Take, for example, our beloved molletes stuffed with succulent shredded meat, slow-cooked for eight hours to achieve perfect tenderness, a testament to our dedication to flavor and quality. Each bite is a journey through the rich culinary heritage of both Argentina and the Mediterranean, offering a unique gastronomic experience that will surely leave a lasting impression.
About.Fayiz: Cuisine of the Eastern Mediterranean...Above all from Lebanon. Lebanese immigrants to Argentina were linked to our childhood and we share their customs and foods. There is an indelible memory on the palate from childhood. How not to remember the baked kepe, rice with angel hair and cinnamon, stuffed grape leaves with meat and rice, and the cornstarch shortbread with walnuts from grandmother... The childhood memories of Pedro. You can eat the following dishes: Tabbouleh salad, hummus, cheese/chicken fingers, French fries, onion rings, shawarma, durum, chicken/beef kebab, feta cheese, falafel.
